headline: Rao's Homemade® Adds Two New Elevated Varieties to Its Creamy Sauce Lineup
summary: Rao's Homemade, an iconic name in authentic Italian cuisine, is introducing two new sauces, Creamy Roasted Garlic and Creamy Peppered Parmesan. Made with mascarpone, a mild and creamy Italian cheese that adds a smooth consistency and luscious flavor, these sauces bring a delicious, decadent twist to pasta night and beyond.

headline: The Campbell’s Company to Report Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results on June 8, 2026
summary: CAMDEN, N.J., May 19, 2026--The Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) (Campbell’s) announced it will report its financial results for the third quarter fiscal 2026 ended May 3, 2026 on June 8, 2026.

headline: A Look At Campbell Soup (CPB) Valuation After Earnings Beat Tariff And Inflation Headwinds
summary: Campbell's (CPB) stock was in focus after the company reported quarterly earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, with 1% sales growth and earnings beating forecasts despite ongoing tariff and inflation pressures. See our latest analysis for Campbell's. Even with the earnings beat and a reaffirmed quarterly dividend of US$0.39 per share, Campbell's share price is down 26.8% over the past three months and the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 39.3%. This points to fading...
